text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I won't lose like I did before. I'm a completely
different Umamusume today!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
My hair's got the right amount of volume, and the
ends are just right.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, I've got my sparkling smile and my
pose on point.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I'm shining more today than I was
yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! This is the real me! I'm gonna look super
cute and get the win today!
